The 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been conclusively eliminated. Bolixun (Nanjing) Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. presents a profile of an 'Asset-Light Industrial IPC (Industrial PC) & Import/Export Proxy'. While officially registered under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and claiming to manufacture 'industrial control computers and systems', its physical baseline tells a completely different story: it operates with just 2 insured employees and 500,000 RMB paid-in capital (despite a heavily inflated 10M RMB registered capital). True manufacturing of IPCs requires substantial capital and assembly lines, which are impossible with 2 employees. The core of its operations lies in 'IC design, software development, and Import/Export agency'. It functions as a micro-trading node and fabless software developer, procuring or designing specialized industrial control hardware and software, and acting as a proxy for cross-border trade of these specialized components.
